what is magic mcp? be quick

---

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-03-03 21:55:47Z)**_

Magic MCP is an AI-powered design component tool that integrates with Claude Code. It provides three main tools:

- **`21st_magic_component_builder`** — generates UI components from descriptions
- **`21st_magic_component_inspiration`** — finds design inspiration/examples
- **`21st_magic_component_refiner`** — iteratively improves existing components
- **`logo_search`** — searches for logos

It's essentially a Figma/design-to-code bridge that lets you generate and refine React/UI components directly from natural language prompts within your Claude Code session.

— Superman
